title: wasm pending map grows without bound when server is alive but unresponsive
description: WasmTransport.send_request inserts each in-flight request into the pending HashMap. The map is only drained when the WebSocket closes (onclose). If the server keeps the connection open but stops responding, every send_message or send_whisper call inserts into pending and nothing removes stale entries. No per-request timeout and no max-pending cap.
